message:
style(plan): rustfmt adjustments for certificate and rewrite modules

Certificate module (certificate.rs):
- Reformat import statements for clarity
- Adjust method call chaining to match rustfmt conventions
- Reformat error construction to use multi-line struct syntax
- Consistent formatting for if-let-Err patterns

Rewrite module (rewrite.rs):
- Reformat apply_rewrites() calls in tests to multi-line style
- Consistent argument alignment for better readability

No behavioral changes, purely formatting for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
